---
title: "Kader Mohideen"
description: "CV — cybersecurity solution architect, bridging security and AI/ML."
page-layout: full
---

::: {.panel}
**Cybersecurity Solution Architect**  ·  Presales & AI/ML  ·  Riyadh, Saudi Arabia

CISSP-certified solution architect with 9+ years across the GCC/MENA enterprise market — designing zero-trust, DDI, network and cloud-security deployments, and now bridging that foundation with AI/ML.

[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/kader-xai/){.btn .btn-primary} &nbsp; [GitHub](https://github.com/kader-xai){.btn .btn-primary} &nbsp; [Email](mailto:pentest101@protonmail.com){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

## Experience

::: {.panel}
**Presales Consultant / Solution Architect** — Starlink, Riyadh · *2021 – Present*

**Professional Services Consultant** — Starlink, Riyadh · *2019 – 2020*

**Cybersecurity Subject-Matter Expert** — Government Entity, Riyadh · *2018 – 2019*

**Senior Penetration Tester** — Riyadh · *2017*

**Penetration Tester** — Paladion, Mumbai · *2016 – 2017*
:::

## Education

::: {.panel}
**MBA, Artificial Intelligence & Data Science** — SRM University *(in progress)*

**M.Sc, Cloud & Enterprise Computing** — Nottingham Trent University, UK

**B.Tech, Information Technology** — Anna University, India
:::

## Licenses & Skills

::: {.panel}
**Certifications:** CISSP · CCSP · CCSK · CCZT · ECPPT V2

**Focus:** Solution Architecture · Zero Trust · Cloud & Network Security · Presales · AI / ML · Data Science
:::
